zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Berkeley於1474年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，她的父親Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley38歲，母親Isabel Meade31歲。她於大約1495年與Sir William Denys在英國格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年4月5日在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Berkeley于1474年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，她的父亲Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley38岁，母亲Isabel Meade31岁。她于大约1495年与Sir William Denys在英国格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1523年4月5日在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Berkeley was born in 1474, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, was 38 and her mother, Isabel Meade, was 31. She married Sir William Denys about 1495, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 5 April 1523, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Berkeley est née en 1474, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Isabel Meade, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Denys environ 1495, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 avril 1523, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Berkeley 1474 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley 38 und ihre Mutter Isabel Meade 31. Sie hat um 1495 in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England Sir William Denys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. April 1523 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Berkeley è nata il nel 1474 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Isabel Meade, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Denys circa 1495, nel Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 5 aprile 1523, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Berkeleyが1474年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeleyは38歳，母Isabel Meadeは31歳であった。約1495年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムでSir William Denysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年4月5日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Berkeley(이)가 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Meade(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1495년 영국 그루스스터실르 디람에서 Sir William Denys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 4월 5일 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Berkeley nasceu em 1474, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Meade, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Denys aproximadamente 1495, em Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de abril de 1523, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Berkeley родилась в 1474 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Meade, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Denys около 1495 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 5 апреля 1523 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Berkeley nació en 1474, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Maurice Berkeley , 3rd Baron Berkeley, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Isabel Meade, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir William Denys aproximadamente 1495, en Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 5 de abril de 1523, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
